prompt: Extract water/utility bill summary details from this Region of Peel (Peel Region) water bill email or statement. Include the bill_number (invoice or bill number), account_number, billing_period (e.g. Jan 1 - Feb 28, 2026), bill_date (date the bill was generated/issued, FORMAT STRICTLY AS YYYY-MM-DD), due_date (payment due date, FORMAT STRICTLY AS YYYY-MM-DD), amount_due (total amount owing), previous_balance, payments_received, new_charges, water_charges, wastewater_charges, stormwater_charges, and any late_payment_charge if present. If a total water consumption in cubic metres (m³) or litres is shown, extract it as total_consumption. Do NOT extract individual line-item details.

example.text:
Region of Peel
Water Bill Statement

Account Number: 1183613878
Bill Number: WB-20260301
Bill Date: March 1, 2026
Billing Period: January 1, 2026 to February 28, 2026
Due Date: April 6, 2026

Previous Balance: $275.50
Payment Received - Thank you: -$275.50

New Charges:
  Water Supply Charges:      $125.40
  Wastewater Charges:        $98.72
  Stormwater Charges:        $59.62

Total New Charges:  $283.74

Total Amount Due: $283.74

Total Consumption: 42 m³
